summary: Completed frontend testing of 7 bug fixes for HevaPOS. All tests PASSED: (1) Admin mobile sidebar shows all 10 menu items + logout, (2) Staff mobile POS is responsive with no overflow, (3) Dashboard total orders card is clickable and navigates to /orders, (4) No Connect Printer button in POS screen for staff, (5) No printer setup section in RestaurantSettings, (6) PrinterSettings page has Add Printer button, (7) No Connect Printer button in POS screen for admin.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error when loading orders (seen in console logs)

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle and Description for Sheet component - accessibility issue but not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: The Sidebar.js has duplicate NavContent components (NavContent and MobileNavContent) with same data-testid attributes - this caused initial test confusion but works correctly
Sheet component missing DialogTitle and Description for accessibility - should add VisuallyHidden title
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 bug fixes verified working: (1) Admin mobile sidebar now shows all menu items (Dashboard, Tables, Categories, Products, POS, Orders, Reports, Cash Drawer, Printers, Settings) plus Logout button - the fix involved changing SheetContent and NavContent structure, (2) Staff mobile POS fits viewport with no horizontal overflow, (3) Dashboard 'Today's Orders' card has cursor-pointer and onClick navigates to /orders, (4-5) No Connect Printer button in POS screen for both admin and staff, (6) No printer setup in RestaurantSettings - only business info form, (7) PrinterSettings page has full printer management with Add Printer button.

test_1_admin_mobile_sidebar.details: All 10 menu items visible in mobile sidebar: Dashboard, Tables, Categories, Products, POS, Orders, Reports, Cash Drawer, Printers, Settings. Logout button also visible at bottom.

test_2_dashboard_orders_clickable.details: Orders card has cursor-pointer style and clicking navigates to /orders

test_3_restaurant_settings_no_printer.details: No printer setup section found in RestaurantSettings - only business information form

test_4_printer_settings_has_management.details: Add Printer button found in PrinterSettings page

test_5_pos_no_connect_printer_admin.details: No Connect Printer button in POS screen for admin user

test_6_staff_mobile_pos_responsive.details: POS screen fits within 375px viewport with no horizontal overflow. Place Order button visible.

test_7_staff_pos_no_connect_printer.details: No Connect Printer button in POS screen for staff user
